options.description: Render a pre-existing document from your workspace by ID

options.name: Validate JSON
options.description: Validate a document JSON without rendering (no credits charged)

options.name: Validate Markdown
options.description: Validate Extended Markdown content without rendering (no credits charged)

options.name: Create From JSON
options.description: Create a bulk render job with an array of variable sets

options.name: Create From File
options.description: Create a bulk render job by uploading a CSV, Excel, or JSON file

options.name: Get Status
options.description: Get the current status of a bulk render job

options.name: Download Output
options.description: Download the bulk render output as a ZIP file by job ID

options.name: Create Document
options.description: Create a new document in a project

options.name: Create Project
options.description: Create a new project in the organization (always PUBLIC)

options.name: Get Document
options.description: Get a document by ID including its latest content

options.name: Get Document Variables
options.description: Get the variable definitions for a document (useful for bulk rendering)

options.name: List Documents
options.description: List all documents for the organization

options.name: List Projects
options.description: List all projects for the organization

options.name: Delete
options.description: Delete a Document Tools file from storage

options.name: Delete Temporary Image
options.description: Delete a temporary rendering image before it expires. These images are for Render from JSON / Render from Markdown only (not for Document Tools).

options.name: Download
options.description: Download a Document Tools file by ID (input or output files)

options.name: Get Details
options.description: Get metadata for a file uploaded for Document Tools

options.name: List
options.description: List all non-expired files uploaded for Document Tools

options.name: List Temporary Images
options.description: List all non-expired temporary rendering images. These images are for Render from JSON / Render from Markdown only (not for Document Tools).

options.name: Upload
options.action: Upload a file for document tools
options.description: Upload a file (PDF, DOCX, ODT, PNG, JPEG, max 50MB) for use with Document Tools operations. Files expire after 60 minutes.

options.name: Upload Temporary Image
options.description: Upload a temporary image (JPEG, PNG, WebP, max 25MB) for use in Render from JSON or Render from Markdown. Expires after 24h. Not for Document Tools — use Upload instead.

options.name: Add Watermark
options.description: Add a text watermark to all or specific pages of a PDF

options.name: Compress
options.description: Compress a PDF to reduce file size

options.name: Convert to Image
options.description: Convert PDF pages to images (PNG or JPEG)

options.name: Convert to PDF
options.action: Convert DOCX or ODT to PDF
options.description: Convert a DOCX or ODT file to PDF (or other formats). The input format is detected automatically from the uploaded file.

options.name: Fill Form
options.description: Fill form fields in a PDF with provided values

options.name: Get Form Fields
options.description: Extract form field names, types, and current values from a PDF. Returns result directly.

options.name: Get Job Status
options.description: Get the current status of a Document Tools job

options.name: Get Metadata
options.description: Extract metadata from a PDF (page count, title, author, etc.). Returns result directly.

options.name: Keep/Remove Pages
options.description: Keep or remove specific pages from a PDF

options.name: List Jobs
options.description: List Document Tools jobs for the organization

options.name: Merge PDFs
options.description: Merge 2–20 PDF files into a single PDF

options.name: Protect
options.description: Encrypt a PDF with password protection

options.name: Replace Placeholders
options.description: Replace placeholder tags in a DOCX or ODT document with provided values and convert to the desired output format

options.name: Rotate Pages
options.description: Rotate specific pages of a PDF by 90, 180, or 270 degrees

options.name: Split PDF
options.description: Split a PDF into multiple parts by page ranges

options.name: Unlock
options.description: Remove password protection from a PDF
